FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class Win32App

Namespace
FluentGpu.Pal.Windows
Assembly
FluentGpu.Pal.Windows.dll

Real Win32 PAL: CreateWindowExW + a static WndProc + a PeekMessage pump that drains WM_* into POD input.

public sealed class Win32App : IPlatformApp, IDisposable

Clipboard

The system clipboard (UI-thread only).

public IClipboard Clipboard { get; }

Property Value

IClipboard

Methods

CreatePopupWindow(in PopupWindowDesc)

A WS_POPUP | WS_EX_NOACTIVATE | WS_EX_TOOLWINDOW | WS_EX_NOREDIRECTIONBITMAP owned window — the engine analogue of WinUI's windowed CPopup HWND (Popup_Partial.cpp:1019 SetIsWindowed). Never activates; mouse input over it is forwarded to the owner Win32Window translated into owner-client DIP.

public IPlatformPopupWindow? CreatePopupWindow(in PopupWindowDesc desc)

Parameters

desc PopupWindowDesc

Returns

IPlatformPopupWindow

CreateWindow(in WindowDesc) 

public IPlatformWindow CreateWindow(in WindowDesc desc)

Parameters

desc WindowDesc

Returns

IPlatformWindow

Dispose()

Performs application-defined tasks associated with freeing, releasing, or resetting unmanaged resources.

public void Dispose()

GetWorkArea(Point2)

Work area (desktop minus taskbar) of the monitor containing the point, in physical virtual-screen px. The same data WinUI's windowed popups place against (FlyoutBase_Partial.cpp:3382-3388 monitor bounds; Popup.cpp windowed placement) — MonitorFromPoint(MONITOR_DEFAULTTONEAREST) + GetMonitorInfoW().rcWork.

public RectF GetWorkArea(Point2 screenPointPx)

Parameters

screenPointPx Point2

Returns

RectF

OpenUri(string)

WinUI HyperlinkButton NavigateUri launch (HyperLinkButton_Partial.cpp:172).

public void OpenUri(string uri)

Parameters

uri string
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
